category_sources: source_facts.description says portable multi-agent harness for .agents-based skills and workflows; official README describes a portable agent harness for project-specific skills and workflows.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is oh-my-agent; official GitHub repository and docs use oh-my-agent.
docs_sources: Official firstfluke.com docs provide installation and CLI documentation; official GitHub README provides overview and quick start.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub repository, corroborated by official docs linking to GitHub.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies multi-agent harness and workflows; official docs list CLI commands and agent presets.
